chapter_title.en: Clarification of the Transmission Chain to Masadah Ibn Ziyad

text: و ما كان فيه عن مسعدة بن زياد فقد رويته عن أبي؛ و محمّد بن الحسن- رضي اللّه عنهما- عن سعد بن عبد اللّه؛ و الحميريّ جميعا عن هارون بن مسلم، عن مسعدة ابن زياد.

en.bab-ul-qaim-publications: And whatever is narrated from Masadah ibn Ziyad, I have narrated it from my father and from Muhammad ibn Al-Hasan - may Allah (swt) be pleased with them - from Saʿd ibn Abdullah and Al-Himyari together, from Harun ibn Muslim, from Masadah ibn Ziyad.
